title: Q2 Board Update
author: Alex Morgan
summary: Revenue grew 18% quarter-over-quarter. We closed three enterprise deals and reduced churn to 2.1%. Primary focus next quarter is expanding the partner channel and shipping the reporting automation beta.

sections.title: Highlights
sections.body: Enterprise pipeline is up 34%. NPS improved to 52. Engineering delivered the document automation prototype on schedule.

sections.title: Challenges
sections.body: Hiring for senior platform roles remains slower than planned. Two customer integrations slipped due to dependency on external APIs.

risks.description: Partner onboarding may slip if legal review extends beyond June
risks.mitigation: Pre-approve standard agreement template with counsel
